target.description: Industry, market, or domain to scan for trends (e.g. fintech, remote work, AI infrastructure)

horizon.description: Time horizon for trend relevance: 6mo, 12mo, or 24mo

focus.description: Narrow the scan: tech, regulatory, demand, investment, talent, or all

description: Market and macro trend scanner — identifies signals with velocity, impact horizon, and relevance tagging for downstream analysis
usage: market trends, industry trends, what's happening in, emerging trends, macro trends, signal scanning, trend analysis
